kept.title: Mapping Europe's AI Workforce Opportunity
kept.raw_summary: OpenAI released a report examining how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, identifying which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

kept.title: How agents are transforming work
kept.raw_summary: A new OpenAI research paper demonstrates how AI agents enable longer, more complex tasks and expand productivity across various professional roles.

kept.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
kept.raw_summary: Jason Liu demonstrates how Codex preserves context, manages complex projects, and enables work to continue beyond single prompts.

kept.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
kept.raw_summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex globally to employees, representing one of OpenAI's largest enterprise AI rollouts.

kept.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
kept.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI confidently.

kept.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
kept.raw_summary: GPT-5.5 Instant enhances ChatGPT's health responses with improved reasoning, context, clarity, and physician-informed evaluations.

kept.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
kept.raw_summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to identify 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved rare disease cases in children.

kept.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
kept.raw_summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrate how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction.

kept.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
kept.raw_summary: LifeSciBench is an expert-authored benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

kept.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
kept.raw_summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data.

kept.title: Adaptive Financial Transformer with Regime-Gated Attention for Stock Return Prediction
kept.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29347 by Dishan Sarkar

kept.title: Reliability, Faithfulness, and the Limits of Post-hoc Explanations of Opaque Scientific Models
kept.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29346 by Nick Oh et al.

kept.title: PHF: Privileged Hidden Flow for On-Policy Self-Distillation
kept.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29340 by Yuhan Li et al.

kept.title: Nonlinear mixture model motivated subspace clustering
kept.raw_summary: arxiv paper id 2606.29261 by Ivica Kopriva

kept.title: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
kept.raw_summary: Video generation models have emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied world simulation. However, both general-domain video generators and robot-specific data fine-tuned models can still produce physically implausible manipulations, including discontinuous motion trajectories and inconsistent robot-object interactions, which limits their reliability as world simulators. Through extensive experiments, we find that such physical instability mainly arises from two factors: deformation of moving

kept.title: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
kept.raw_summary: We study whether we can learn novel manipulation skills from human actions to a bi-manual robot with parallel grippers. Human action data is cheap, abundant, and diverse, making it one of the most promising resources for scaling up robot learning.

kept.title: Import AI 463: Self-improving robots; a 10k Chinese GPU cluster; and an elegiac essay for the human era
kept.raw_summary: NVIDIA develops ENPIRE software enabling robots to autonomously improve policies through self-experimentation. Tencent details ARGUS system for managing 10,000+ GPU training clusters. Essay explores potential human disempowerment in superintelligent AI future.

kept.title: Latest open artifacts (#22): Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
kept.raw_summary: Assessment of the open ecosystem showing increasing diversity of model makers. Categories include pure model makers (DeepSeek, Poolside), Big Tech companies (Alibaba, Google), and product companies (JetBrains, Zed). Notable releases: NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Ultra, Cohere Command A+, GLM-5.2, Zyphra ZAYA1, and Poolside Laguna-M.1.

kept.raw_summary: 有人盯上的不是钱，而是 Token

kept.title: STARK raises €500M to build Europe's next defense prime
kept.raw_summary: German defense company STARK, building autonomous unmanned strike systems, secured €500M in funding led by Sequoia and Founders Fund. The company manufactures software-defined loitering munitions and unmanned vessels designed for rapid, cost-effective production at military scale.

kept.title: How Revolut runs AI at scale
kept.raw_summary: Revolut's machine learning head Nikolay Donets discusses operating AI in a regulated fintech serving 70M+ customers across 40 countries. Key insights include governance by use-case, centralized gateway architecture, fallback chains, and maintaining human oversight for critical decisions.

kept.title: Odyssey raises $310M Series B for world models
kept.raw_summary: Odyssey, building AI systems that generate interactive worlds rather than static videos, raised $310M at $1.45B valuation. The company developed Starchild-1 for real-time multimodal generation, Agora-1 for multi-agent simulation, and PROWL for self-directed model improvement.

kept.title: From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery
kept.raw_summary: Research article exploring Brain2Qwerty technology that enables communication through brain signals without requiring surgical intervention.

kept.title: AI助手不该只等人提问：清华团队两项新研究，探索理解用户与适时互动
kept.raw_summary: 清华大学人工智能学院发布EgoIntrospect与IPIBench两项研究成果。前者聚焦AI如何理解用户的情绪、意图和记忆需求；后者关注AI在连续视频流中如何判断何时提醒、何时沉默。两项研究表明下一代AI助手应学会读懂人并适时互动。
